title: lasianthus bahorucanus
intro: Lasianthus bahorucanus, also known as Bahoruca, is a plant species native to the tropical forests of Central America, belonging to the family Theaceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Bahoruca include reducing fever, alleviating pain and inflammation, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Traditionally, Bahoruca is used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are brewed from its leaves and flowers to harness its medicinal properties.
